posts.title: Berlin Beer Gardens Guide: 12 Spots to Drink Like a Local
posts.summary: A local guide's detailed breakdown of the 12 best beer gardens in Berlin, including historic institutions like Prater, lakeside gems, forest escapes, and modern craft beer hubs, plus local etiquette tips.
posts.alt: Prater Biergarten with cozy outdoor seating and yellow chairs under leafy green chestnut trees

posts.title: East Side Gallery: Berlin's Open-Air Wall Guide (2026)
posts.summary: The longest surviving stretch of the Berlin Wall, explained by a local guide: the famous murals and what they mean, how to visit, and how it fits the wider Wall story.
posts.alt: The Fraternal Kiss mural by Dmitri Vrubel at the East Side Gallery, showing Soviet leader Brezhnev kissing East German leader Honecker.

posts.title: Shopping in Berlin: Where to Actually Shop in 2026
